name: archives
description: Gestione di materiale archivistico e fotografico seguendo gli standard internazionali ISAD(G) (General International Standard Archival Description), ISAAR(CPF) (authority record per persone, enti, famiglie) e RiC-O (Records in Contexts Ontology, ICA 2023). Modello gerarchico a 4 livelli — Fondo → Serie → Fascicolo → Unità — con export Linked Data RiC-O JSON-LD per harvester ICA, Europeana, ArchivesPortalEurope. Ispirato al formato ABA (Arbejderbevægelsens Bibliotek og Arkiv, Copenhagen) e a ARKIS II degli Archivi Nazionali Svedesi.
changelog: v1.5.0 (Pinakes 0.7.11): full RiC-CM (Records in Contexts Conceptual Model, ICA 2023) support — Phase 1 read-only RiC-O JSON-LD export on /archives/{id}/ric.json, /archives/agents/{id}/ric.json, /archives/collection.ric.json (HTTP Link header + IIIF seeAlso cross-references); Phase 2 agents as first-class entities (authority_records extended with ric_type / identifier_uri / dates of existence and dedicated tables for agent relations and external identifiers); Phase 3 activities as first-class entities (archive_activities + archive_unit_activities aligned with ISDF — Function / Activity / Transaction / Task / Mandate); Phase 4 places + polymorphic relations graph (archive_places — Country/Region/Province/Municipality/Locality/Building/Room/GeographicFeature — plus archive_relations whose source/target ENUM covers archival_unit, authority_record, archive_activity, archive_place); Phase 5 native admin UI for activities, places and relations with autocomplete (/api/archives/entities); Phase 6 OAI-PMH metadataPrefix=ric-o emitting canonical RDF/XML for archival_unit records.
author: Fabiodalez

features: Modello gerarchico a 4 livelli (Fonds / Series / File / Item)
Authority records ISAAR(CPF) + RiC-CM agents (Person / CorporateBody / Family / Position / Group)
Attività ISDF (Function / Activity / Transaction / Task / Mandate) collegabili a unità e agenti
Luoghi RiC-CM (paesi/regioni/comuni/edifici) con identificativi GeoNames / Wikidata / Getty TGN
Grafo polimorfico delle relazioni fra unità, agenti, attività e luoghi
Import/export MARCXML (formato ABA / MARC21 Slim) + validazione XSD
SRU 1.2 endpoint (explain / searchRetrieve / scan) per federated search
Materiale fotografico e audiovisivo (ABA billedmarc — 15 codici material-form)
Export RiC-O JSON-LD (Records in Contexts Ontology, ICA 2023) per harvester Linked Data
